form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Backing up quickly after 6th over 1609m at Western Fair Raceway, at the bell was leading beaten 6 m by St Lads Mischief (1:57.30) in G on April 8 at $9.45. The run before 6th over 1609m at Western Fair Raceway was 6th- at the bell, beaten 12 m by Thatmomentinlife (2:00.40) in G on March 16 at $20.80. Watch for a far better effort this time.
